leadText: Pallet Town (Japanese: マサラタウン Masara Town) is a small town located in southwestern Kanto. It is the hometown of the player and their rival in the Kanto-based games. In other games, it is specifically the hometown of Red and Blue. In Pokémon the Series, it is the hometown of Ash and Gary. Professor Oak's Laboratory, where the famous Professor Oak conducts his research, is located in the town. The town has two exits. To the north is Route 1, leading to Viridian City. To the south is Route 21, a water route leading to Cinnabar Island.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Pallet Town is the only town without any healing location in Gold, Silver, and Crystal. In the Pokémon Adventures manga, Pallet Town is famous for being the hometown of many great Trainers, including Professor Oak . In fact, every Trainer who has ever won the Indigo Plateau Pokémon League tournament has come from Pallet Town. In Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver , Red 's bedroom features an area rug around his bed that is red in color. Blue 's bedroom features a similar area rug, which is instead green in color. This is a reference to Blue's Japanese name, Green. Origin [ edit | edit source ] Pallet Town is based on Machida, Tokyo , Satoshi Tajiri 's hometown. [ 1 ] However, its location on the map better corresponds to somewhere in the Shizuoka Prefecture . ↑ 【ポケモンゲーム史８】ゲーム『ポケモン』のテーマとは (Japanese)
